diagrams.title: 5NF Decomposition Process Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing steps to check and achieve 5NF: Start → Check if in 4NF → Identify Join Dependencies → Check if JDs implied by candidate keys → If YES → In 5NF. If NO → Decompose → Test lossless-join → Repeat until 5NF
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the systematic approach to achieving 5NF

diagrams.title: Cyclic Join Dependency Example
diagrams.description: Three-circle Venn diagram showing SUPPLY relation decomposed into three relations forming a cycle: SUPPLIER_PART shares with PART_PROJECT, which shares with PROJECT_SUPPLIER, which shares with SUPPLIER_PART

diagrams.title: Lossless Join Test Matrix
diagrams.description: Matrix representation for Chase Test showing how to verify lossless-join decomposition with example attributes a,b,c for R(A,B,C) decomposed to R1(A,B) and R2(B,C)
diagrams.purpose: Visual method to verify if decomposition preserves all information

visuals.title: Join Dependencies And Fifth Normal Form
visuals.description: Visual diagram for join dependencies and fifth normal form
